DemandAdjustment - Enum Class in simpaths.model.enums
The Demand Adjustment refers to the update of the initial labour demand at each time-step, which is derived from the equilibrium value of labour demand at the previous time-step with an adjustment to take into account such factors as population or income growth.

donorPoolAveraging - Variable in class simpaths.model.SimPathsModel
 
DonorTaxImputation - Class in simpaths.model.taxes
CLASS TO MANAGE TAX IMPUTATIONS DRAWING ON DONOR DATA Imputations are made via a 3-step process: 1: obtain donor pool from full population by coarse-exact matching 2: obtain candidate pool from donor pool based on proximity to original income 3: select single candidate from donor pool or average over pool to impute disposable income
DonorTaxImputation() - Constructor for class simpaths.model.taxes.DonorTaxImputation
CONSTRUCTORS
DonorTaxImputation(DonorKeys) - Constructor for class simpaths.model.taxes.DonorTaxImputation

Grids - Class in simpaths.model.decisions
CLASS TO DEFINE GRIDS THAT STORE INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION SOLUTIONS MODULES OF THE CLASS FACILITATE INPUT AND EXTRACTION OF OPTIMISED DATA AS WELL AS DESCRIPTIVE DETAIL OF DATA THE GRIDS ARE DEFINED AS ONE-DIMENSIONAL VECTORS ELEMENTS OF EACH VECTOR ARE ORGANISED TO REFLECT IMPLICIT DIMENSIONAL AXES SEE DEFINITION OF THE AXES ATTRIBUTE FOR DETAILS

instantiateAlignmentMaps() - Static method in class simpaths.data.Parameters
 
interpolateAll(States, boolean) - Method in class simpaths.model.decisions.Grid
METHOD TO RETURN A NUMERICAL APPROXIMATION FOR THE GRID VALUE ASSOCIATED WITH A COMPLETE VECTOR OF STATE CHARACTERISTICS The method begins by identifying the grid slice associated with the supplied combination of discrete states Linear states are then approximated by a linear interpolation method, interpolateContinuous
interpolateContinuous(States, int, long) - Method in class simpaths.model.decisions.Grid
METHOD TO RETURN A NUMERICAL APPROXIMATION FOR THE GRID VALUE ASSOCIATED WITH THE SUBSET OF CONTINUOUS STATE CHARACTERISTICS Method uses linear interpolation methods to approximate value for grid slice associated with continuous state variables, as supplied by the interpolateAll() method.

ManagerFileGrids - Class in simpaths.model.decisions
CLASS TO MANAGE INTERACTIONS BETWEEN THE IO GRIDS AND THE LOCAL FILE SYSTEM
ManagerFileGrids() - Constructor for class simpaths.model.decisions.ManagerFileGrids
 
ManagerPopulateGrids - Class in simpaths.model.decisions
CLASS TO MANAGE IDENTIFICATION OF LOOK-UP TABLE FOR INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION DECISIONS THE LOOK-UP TABLE IS REFERRED TO THROUGHOUT AS THE 'GRIDS'
ManagerPopulateGrids() - Constructor for class simpaths.model.decisions.ManagerPopulateGrids
 
ManagerRegressions - Class in simpaths.data
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF SUPPLEMENTARY DATA FOR INTERACTING WITH JAS-MINE REGRESSION METHODS
ManagerRegressions() - Constructor for class simpaths.data.ManagerRegressions
 
ManagerSolveGrids - Class in simpaths.model.decisions
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF SOLUTIONS TO POPULATE INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION GRIDS THE SOLUTION PROCEDURE RUNS THROUGH ALL STATE COMBINATIONS DESCRIBED BY THE GRIDS VIA FOUR NESTED LOOPS THE FIRST (OUTER-MOST) LOOP CONSIDERS SLICES OF THE GRIDS DISTINGUISHED BY AGE THIS IS MOTIVATED BY THE USE OF BACKWARD INDUCTION TECHNIQUES BY THE SOLUTION METHOD THE SECOND LOOP CONSIDERS COMBINATIONS OF CHARACTERISTICS, FOR WHICH EXPECTATIONS ARE EXOGENOUS OF CONTROL VARIABLES THIS ALLOWS EVALUATIONS FOR EXPECTATIONS OVER THESE VARIABLES TO BE DONE ONCE FOR ALL COMBINATIONS OF STATES CONSIDERED IN THE INNER TWO LOOPS STATES IN THIS LOOP ARE IDENTIFIED BY AXES[aa][ii][4] = 0 OR 0.5 THE THIRD LOOP IS PARALLISED TO TAKE FULL ADVANTAGE OF COMPUTING RESOURCES THE FOURTH (INNER-MOST) LOOP IS SEPARATED FROM THE THIRD LOOP ONLY TO ECONOMISE THE OVER-HEAD ASSOCIATED WITH PARALLELISATIONS
ManagerSolveGrids() - Constructor for class simpaths.model.decisions.ManagerSolveGrids
 
ManagerSolveState - Class in simpaths.model.decisions
CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF NUMERICAL SOLUTIONS FOR SPECIFIC STATE COMBINATION MANAGER EVALUATES THE FEASIBLE DISCRETE CONTROLS, AND OBTAINS SOLUTIONS FOR ALL CONTINUOUS CONTROLS FOR EACH FEASIBLE COMBINATION OF DISCRETE CONTROLS.
ManagerSolveState() - Constructor for class simpaths.model.decisions.ManagerSolveState

setupNewBenefitUnit(boolean) - Method in class simpaths.model.Person
CREATE NEW BENEFIT UNIT FOR PERSON A new benefit unit is created for someone when: they reach age of maturity - default to parental household (no change in household) they enter a new cohabiting relationship they leave a cohabiting relationship (in which case it is the woman that is allocated a new benefit unit)
